sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30882" key="ei)dwlola/trhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰδωλο-λάτρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30882.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">idol-worshipper, idolater</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:5:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.10</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
